title: Arbitrary manual text live extraction fall-through
problem: NM-1 proved live validated writes via extract-claims-live for one non-fixture source, but the standard manual pipeline still checksum-resolves mock fixtures for synthnote sources and falls through to generic golden fixtures for unknown manual_text in mock mode. Operators need a safe, explicit live fall-through when a manual_text checksum is absent from fixtures/manual_source_fixture_map.json, without weakening golden/mock determinism or allowing accidental live writes to the default graph DB.
acceptance_criteria: A new arbitrary .txt or .md source not in the fixture map can be ingested.
In explicit live mode, absent fixture checksum falls through to Ollama extraction.
At least one validated accepted claim is persisted to a gitignored DB.
At least one rejection is preserved if produced; otherwise report honestly.
Existing fixture/manual synthnote tests remain deterministic.
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
non_goals: No public export of live results or public site changes.
No replacement of golden test fixtures.
rollback_plan: Revert claim_extractor live fall-through and CLI flag; extract-claims-live remains available as NM-1 escape hatch.
